data.title: 国际服网页活动「Panopticon Institution Exclusive Disclosure」提前结束
data.summary: The Panopticon Institution Exclusive Disclosure Web Event will end early on 3/19 (Sat) at 03:00 (UTC
data.body:
The Panopticon Institution Exclusive Disclosure Web Event will end early on 3/19 (Sat) at 03:00 (UTC).
※The event reward for the remaining period, Pyroxenes x1,000 will be delivered as originally planned.

Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/97404
